plugins.name: amir_system
plugins.description: User-scope core: project lifecycle, subagent orchestration, registry, Graphify wrappers, Asana + Playwright MCP, system rules. Available before any project exists.

plugins.name: amir_project
plugins.description: Project-scope component groups. Never auto-enabled: installed per project (--scope project) or rendered as a manifest-selected subset by tools/renderer.py.

project_scope_subset: Rendered by tools/renderer.py into .amir/generated/claude/marketplace/ per .amir/project.yaml selection, then: claude plugin marketplace add .amir/generated/claude/marketplace --scope project

hosts.notes: Both plugins declare plugin.json name 'amir' so every command surfaces as /amir:{name}; command sets are disjoint (enforced by design/component-map.md and tools/validator.py).

project_scope_subset: Rendered by tools/renderer.py per .amir/project.yaml selection: .cursor/commands/amir_<name>.md, .cursor/rules/amir_*.mdc, .cursor/mcp.json (merge; amir entries carry the "//amir-generated" marker key)

hosts.notes: Colons are illegal in Windows filenames, so Cursor project commands are flat files named amir_<name>.md. Regeneration is idempotent; user files are never touched.
